Subject: Running a cleaning company in Houston — 2-minute ask
Body:
Hi Patricia,

I know your inbox is full, so I'll keep this short.

I'm Chris Kendig with Clean Scheduler. We're building scheduling software specifically for residential and commercial cleaning companies — crew schedules, quotes, payments, the day-to-day stuff that usually lives in texts, spreadsheets, and sticky notes. I'm reaching out to owner-operated shops in Houston and Harris County because I want real feedback from people who actually run the routes, not a focus group.

I noticed houston family-owned cleaning company operated by parents and children — that kind of local operation is exactly who we're trying to learn from.

Would you be open to trying Clean Scheduler for a short stretch and telling me what works and what doesn't? No pitch deck, no hard sell — just your honest take. If after that you decide to stick with it, I'll lock in 10% off your subscription for life on any plan. That offer is my way of saying thank you for the time and the feedback.
